notices.title: Admissions Open for Session 2025–26
notices.desc: Admissions are now open for Classes 6 to 12 for the academic session 2025–26. Visit school office or download the admission form below.

notices.title: Holiday List for Academic Session 2025–26
notices.desc: The list of public holidays and vacation schedule for the academic year 2025–26 has been issued as per Haryana Government directives.

notices.title: Annual Sports Day & Prize Distribution Ceremony
notices.desc: Annual Sports Day and Prize Distribution Ceremony was successfully held on 15th March 2025. Congratulations to all prize winners and house champions.

notices.title: Winter Vacation Notice — 21 Dec 2024 to 1 Jan 2025
notices.desc: School will remain closed for winter vacations from 21st December 2024 to 1st January 2025. School reopens on 2nd January 2025.
